description: Determines the properties of the creature's entanglement ability.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's entanglement ability.

entries.description: Target is held until it breaks free.

descriptionTranslations.en: Target is held until it breaks free.

entries.description: The entanglement is temporary, such as a glue that wears out. The GM must determine the duration.

descriptionTranslations.en: The entanglement is temporary, such as a glue that wears out. The GM must determine the duration.

entries.description: While entangled, the target also takes damage. Damage is automatic each round until the target can break free. This could also include creatures with a vice-like bite, such as a crocodile or a shark. Determine damage using the Potency Table.

descriptionTranslations.en: While entangled, the target also takes damage. Damage is automatic each round until the target can break free. This could also include creatures with a vice-like bite, such as a crocodile or a shark. Determine damage using the Potency Table.

entries.description: Entanglement is combined with another ability of the creature, if it possesses one. For instance, if the creature has a poison attack, then it delivers it after a target is entangled.

descriptionTranslations.en: Entanglement is combined with another ability of the creature, if it possesses one. For instance, if the creature has a poison attack, then it delivers it after a target is entangled.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
